narrative:
Osnaburg 2 (precinct in Stark County) has 972 registered voters, with 51.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.9 percentage points.
